name: examples-request-midflow-sends-image
description: User is mid-flow in the website builder (WEB_COLLECT_NAME, industry already known = real estate) and asks to see previous work. The router's off-topic aside used to answer text-only ('yeah I can show you a few') and never send the sample. Now it must send the matched screenshot IMAGE + the real-estate preview URL (sarahmitchell), and stay in WEB_COLLECT_NAME. Regression for: example shows in salesBot but not once the demo flow started.

turns.user: can you show me examples of websites you've built before?
